plssem 0.1.3
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Categorical Models with plssem
    • Higher Order Models
    • Interaction Models with plssem
    • Linear Models with plssem
    • Monte-Carlo Consistent Partial Least Squares
    • Handling Missing Values with plssem
    • Multilevel Models with plssem
    • Ordinal Regression with plssem
    • Parallel Bootstrapping with plssem
    • Unstandardized Estimates

Retrieve bootstrap coefficient matrix

Source: R/model_generics.R
pls_boot.Rd

Retrieve bootstrap coefficient matrix

pls_boot(object)

Arguments

object

A fitted model object.

Value

A PlsSemMatrix of bootstrap replicate parameter vectors (rows = replicates, cols = parameters).

Examples

library(modsem)
library(plssem)

m <- "
  X =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  Z =~ z1 + z2 + z3
  Y =~ y1 + y2 + y3
  Y ~ X + Z + X:Z
"

fit <- pls(m, oneInt, bootstrap = TRUE, boot.R = 50)
pls_boot(fit)
#>     X=~x1  X=~x2  X=~x3  Z=~z1  Z=~z2  Z=~z3  Y=~y1  Y=~y2  Y=~y3    Y~X    Y~Z
#> 1   0.928  0.915  0.874  0.895  0.924  0.924  0.961  0.968  0.959  0.454  0.368
#> 2   0.928  0.908  0.904  0.919  0.912  0.907  0.968  0.950  0.968  0.431  0.359
#> 3   0.937  0.891  0.902  0.898  0.917  0.916  0.973  0.957  0.957  0.392  0.387
#> 4   0.930  0.888  0.913  0.904  0.903  0.932  0.961  0.949  0.972  0.393  0.351
#> 5   0.937  0.882  0.909  0.905  0.903  0.940  0.968  0.951  0.964  0.430  0.336
#> 6   0.923  0.905  0.900  0.892  0.922  0.930  0.967  0.955  0.967  0.412  0.381
#> 7   0.954  0.880  0.909  0.910  0.927  0.916  0.967  0.954  0.969  0.448  0.366
#> 8   0.922  0.893  0.915  0.909  0.926  0.901  0.972  0.949  0.963  0.428  0.381
#> 9   0.930  0.900  0.906  0.932  0.885  0.927  0.972  0.969  0.944  0.434  0.354
#> 10  0.900  0.909  0.911  0.928  0.918  0.903  0.965  0.941  0.978  0.435  0.359
#> 11  0.914  0.912  0.925  0.912  0.898  0.924  0.968  0.955  0.956  0.409  0.334
#> 12  0.917  0.918  0.906  0.918  0.928  0.906  0.961  0.973  0.953  0.428  0.376
#> 13  0.951  0.899  0.884  0.919  0.899  0.923  0.967  0.970  0.956  0.423  0.360
#> 14  0.934  0.911  0.885  0.921  0.910  0.914  0.979  0.947  0.963  0.441  0.349
